title: Currier & Ives Pink Dinnerware Set – 4 Plates + 4 Bowls – Royal China Vintage
condition_notes: No chips, cracks, or crazing. Clean glaze and sharp transfer print.
description:
This charming pink Currier & Ives dinnerware set was made by Royal China (USA) between the 1950s and 1970s. It features the scenes 'The Old Grist Mill' (plates) and 'Early Winter' (bowls). All pieces are original underglaze red transferware with classic mid-century Americana charm.

Includes: 4 dinner plates + 4 bowls. Total of 8 pieces.

Condition: No chips, cracks, or crazing. Beautiful sheen and crisp detail.

Perfect for farmhouse kitchens, cottagecore decor, collectors, or vintage table settings.
shipping_notes: Double-box recommended. Bowls nested with padding. Plates separated with corrugated cardboard.
